reviews.review_description: I love this game dearly but here is some problems (also I know about your little REDACTED thing 🤭) 1. PLEASE make some form of a range weapon. Thanks for the incredibly good game and keep up the hard work.

developer_response.body: It sounds like you ran into a lobby of players doing the "Stab Tag" mode, which is a little different than the main game mode. Our apologies for the confusion! We reduced the price and are keeping the servers online for this game, but we do recommend trying the free Demo for the sequel, Stabby Redux. This game is older and built on older and outdated code and network architecture, so the new one is better made for future development.

reviews.review_title: Don’t waste your money on this game
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend were looking for a good multiplayer game under 10 dollars when we stumbled across stabby the trailer looked kind of fun. So we decided to check it out, however when we begin to play the content was the most underwhelming of any game I have ever played the game doesn’t make sense and it wasn’t worth buying. On top of that my refund was refused for no reason as I tried refunding on the same day that I bout it I had only played about 20 minutes. Meta I hope this game gets taken off your game store.

The title of my review may seem like an overreaction, but it is probably an underreaction. This game has to be one of the CHEAPEST and BEST assassin games I've ever gotten in VR. The overall physics and weaponry are amazing, and the climbing is great, but it can seem to glitch and crash out of the lobby. Other than that, 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Great game if you’re into stealth games
reviews.review_description: Reminds me of assassins creed but multiplayer. There is solo levels that are pretty good but multiplayer is great. Highly recommended if you’re into stealth assassin type games. (You may hear people talk about codes that give you skins. There are code hunts in the Stabby discord so join the discord for more info about it I guess.)

I like games like this but it was kinda just boring, I think with some updates this could be rlly good

Allow me to tell you a story. My first exposure to this game was the Wolf in VR video, which was absolutely hilarious. The game was super janky and weird, and honestly looked pretty pathetic. But I was intrigued. I got the game. The controls were unintuitive, the mechanics were odd, and the level design was certainly interesting. I thought there was no hope for this game.

And then I opened multiplayer.

After an hour or so of running around stabbing, grappling, and slashing people, and my battery running out, I finally got it. This was a multiplayer hangout game at heart, and the missions were just a bonus. The WiVR video didn’t show the multiplayer, which is why is looked so bad. And sure, the game is still janky and weird, but that gives it charm and character.

I never thought I’d say this, but I recommend Stabby.
